requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Iraq COSQC Conformity and MoE / Project Procurement Specifications
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——伊拉克COSQC合格评定及电力部/项目采购规格
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——伊拉克COSQC合格評定及電力部/項目採購規格

summary.en: Iraq's COSQC conformity assessment framework references IEC standards, including IEC 62109-1/-2 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems), as the baseline for PV inverter safety. Major solar projects in Iraq tendered by the Ministry of Electricity and international project developers (TotalEnergies, PowerChina, Masdar) reference IEC 62109-1/-2 in procurement specifications as the required safety evidence for inverters. IEC 62109-1 (Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters) together define the safety type-test framework. Third-party type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is the expected form of compliance demonstration for project submissions and COSQC pre-shipment inspection. IQS (Iraqi Standards) aligned with IEC 62109 apply under COSQC's regulated product regime — the exact IQS numbers and scope should be verified directly with COSQC.
summary.zh: 伊拉克COSQC合格评定框架引用IEC标准，包括IEC 62109-1/-2（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全），作为光伏逆变器安全的基准。伊拉克电力部和国际项目开发商（道达尔能源、中国电力、马斯达尔）招标的大型太阳能项目在采购规格中将IEC 62109-1/-2作为逆变器所需的安全证据。IEC 62109-1（第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求）共同界定了安全型式试验框架。来自ILAC认可实验室的第三方型式试验证据是项目提交和COSQC装运前检查的预期合规证明形式。与IEC 62109对齐的IQS（伊拉克标准）适用于COSQC受监管产品制度——确切的IQS编号和范围应直接向COSQC核实。
summary.zht: 伊拉克COSQC合格評定框架引用IEC標準，包括IEC 62109-1/-2（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全），作為光伏逆變器安全的基準。伊拉克電力部和國際項目開發商（道達爾能源、中國電力、馬斯達爾）招標的大型太陽能項目在採購規格中將IEC 62109-1/-2作為逆變器所需的安全證據。IEC 62109-1（第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求）共同界定了安全型式試驗框架。來自ILAC認可實驗室的第三方型式試驗證據是項目提交和COSQC裝運前檢查的預期合規證明形式。與IEC 62109對齊的IQS（伊拉克標準）適用於COSQC受監管產品制度——確切的IQS編號和範圍應直接向COSQC核實。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (referenced in COSQC conformity and Iraq MoE / project procurement specifications)
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (implicitly applicable as parent standard)
COSQC conformity assessment regime — IQS standards aligned with IEC 62109 (cosqc.gov.iq)
Iraq Ministry of Electricity (MoE) tender specifications — moelc.gov.iq

summary.en: China's primary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers classification, environmental conditions, safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 is a China domestic recommended standard assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. It shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted under COSQC conformity assessment or by Iraq project owners as equivalent to IEC 62109 type-test evidence. CQC and CGC voluntary certifications are available against GB/T 37408 but carry no recognition under the COSQC regime.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要标准为GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖分类、环境条件、安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408是由中国CNAS认可实验室评估的中国国内推荐性标准。其安全意图与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被COSQC合格评定或伊拉克项目业主接受为IEC 62109型式试验证据的等效依据。CQC和CGC依据GB/T 37408提供的自愿认证在COSQC制度下不获认可。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要標準為GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋分類、環境條件、安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408是由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估的中國國內推薦性標準。其安全意圖與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被COSQC合格評定或伊拉克項目業主接受為IEC 62109型式試驗證據的等效依據。CQC和CGC依據GB/T 37408提供的自願認證在COSQC制度下不獲認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy COSQC conformity requirements or Iraq MoE / project IEC 62109-2 type-test requirements for solar PV inverters. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied to Iraq. These IEC 62109 certificates must be included in the documentation package submitted to the COSQC-authorised inspection body for pre-shipment inspection. For Iraq project tenders, verify whether the procurement specification requires IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence from a specific category of accredited laboratory (e.g., ILAC-MRA signatory), and whether model-family coverage (delta review) is accepted or full re-testing is required for each SKU.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足COSQC合格要求或伊拉克电力部/项目对太阳能光伏逆变器的IEC 62109-2型式试验要求。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至伊拉克的特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。上述IEC 62109证书须纳入提交COSQC授权检验机构进行装运前检查的文件包。对于伊拉克项目招标，须核实采购规格是否要求来自特定类别认可实验室（如ILAC-MRA签署方）的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，以及是否接受型号系列覆盖（差异审查）或每个SKU须重新全面测试。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足COSQC合格要求或伊拉克電力部/項目對太陽能光伏逆變器的IEC 62109-2型式試驗要求。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至伊拉克的特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。上述IEC 62109證書須納入提交COSQC授權檢驗機構進行裝運前檢查的文件包。對於伊拉克項目招標，須核實採購規格是否要求來自特定類別認可實驗室（如ILAC-MRA簽署方）的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，以及是否接受型號系列覆蓋（差異審查）或每個SKU須重新全面測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under COSQC conformity assessment for regulated imports and in practice for Iraq MoE and major project tender equipment compliance; IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence is the expected baseline
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law and not recognised under COSQC

source.publisher: COSQC (Central Organization for Standardization and Quality Control), Iraq

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy COSQC conformity requirements or Iraq MoE / project IEC 62109-2 type-test requirements. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory and include the resulting certificates in the COSQC pre-shipment inspection documentation package. Verify current COSQC Technical Regulations, the applicable IQS standards for PV inverters, and project-tender equipment specification requirements directly with COSQC (cosqc.gov.iq) and the Ministry of Electricity (moelc.gov.iq) before committing to a test programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足COSQC合格要求或伊拉克电力部/项目IEC 62109-2型式试验要求。请安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验，并将所得证书纳入COSQC装运前检查文件包。在启动测试计划前，请直接向COSQC（cosqc.gov.iq）和电力部（moelc.gov.iq）核实现行COSQC技术法规、适用于光伏逆变器的IQS标准及项目招标设备规格要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足COSQC合格要求或伊拉克電力部/項目IEC 62109-2型式試驗要求。請安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗，並將所得證書納入COSQC裝運前檢查文件包。在啟動測試計畫前，請直接向COSQC（cosqc.gov.iq）和電力部（moelc.gov.iq）核實現行COSQC技術法規、適用於光伏逆變器的IQS標準及項目招標設備規格要求。
